title: SiTime Q4 2021 Earnings Preview - Record Revenue Expected
text: SiTime was set to report fourth-quarter 2021 results on February 2. For the fourth quarter, SiTime projected revenues to increase sequentially between 10% and 15%, coming to a $69.3-$72.5 million range. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenues was pegged at $71 million, suggesting a whopping 76.3% increase from the year-ago quarter's reported figure of $40.3 million. SITM forecasted adjusted earnings per share in the range of $1.05-$1.15. The consensus mark for earnings stood at $1.09 per share, calling for a robust 153.5% year-over-year increase. The company's earnings beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate in all the trailing four quarters, the average surprise being 53%.
